info.title: MagicSuite.Cli
info.description: Command-line interface for Magic Suite operations. Provides full CRUD operations for schedules, connections, and tenants with beautiful console output.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription:
MagicSuite CLI - Command-line interface for Magic Suite operations

Version: 4.3.71+b0ed15ade0

Documentation: https://docs.magicsuite.net/AdvancedTopics/Cli

options.name: --profile
options.description: Use named profile (e.g., production, alpha3, local)

options.name: --tenant
options.description: Tenant three-letter code, ID, or GUID (overrides default)

options.name: --output
options.description: Write output to file instead of console

options.name: --include-all-tenants
options.description: Include entities from all tenants (required for SuperAdmin users to see cross-tenant data) [default: False]

commands.name: config
commands.description: Manage CLI configuration and profiles

commands.name: profiles
commands.description: Manage environment profiles

commands.name: list
commands.description: List all configured profiles

commands.name: add
commands.description: Add a new profile

commands.name: set-active
commands.description: Set the active profile

commands.name: remove
commands.description: Remove a profile

commands.name: set
commands.description: Set a configuration value

options.name: --profile
options.description: Profile to update (defaults to active profile)

arguments.name: key
arguments.description: Configuration key (e.g., api-url, default-tenant, default-format, verbose-logging)

commands.name: get
commands.description: Get a configuration value

commands.name: list
commands.description: List all configuration settings

commands.name: init
commands.description: Interactive configuration wizard

commands.name: auth
commands.description: Manage authentication credentials

commands.name: token
commands.description: Set API token credentials

options.name: --profile
options.description: Profile to update (defaults to active profile)

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show current authentication status

options.name: --profile
options.description: Profile to check (defaults to active profile)

commands.name: logout
commands.description: Clear authentication credentials

options.name: --profile
options.description: Profile to clear (defaults to active profile)

commands.name: api
commands.description:
Perform CRUD operations on Magic Suite entities via the API.

AVAILABLE COMMANDS:
  get - List entities with filtering and pagination
  get-by-id      - Get a single entity by its ID
  create         - Create a new entity
  patch   - Update specific properties of an entity
  delete         - Delete an entity by ID

DISCOVERED ENTITY TYPES (120):
  AgeingEvent, AntiForgeryToken, ApiInfo, ApiToken, AuditLog, Badge, BillableActivity, BloggerPost, CachedValue, Certification, CertificationAnswerOption, CertificationQuestion, CertificationSession, CertificationSessionAnswer, CertificationTopic, Connection, ConnectionRole, Dashboard, DashboardTab, DashboardTabTile, DataMagicSync, DataMagicSyncExecution, DocMagicStatusInfo, EventManager, EventManagerAction, EventManagerAlertManagementSystem, EventManagerCalculation, EventManagerConstant, EventManagerDeduplicationFieldTransformation, EventManagerDeduplicationMapping, EventManagerIncidentCommentSpec, EventManagerIncidentManagementSystem, EventManagerIncidentMapping, EventManagerIncidentSpec, EventManagerInstance, EventManagerPayload, EventManagerProblemCommentSpec, EventManagerProblemMapping, EventManagerProblemSpec, EventManagerProblemSpecAction, EventManagerSnippet, EventManagerTest, EventManagerTestOverride, EventManagerTestPayload, EventManagerVersion, FeedbackItem, FileDownloadKey, IdentifiedItem, Job, JobClaim, JsonBlob, MacroParameterDefault, MacroSpec, MacroSpecExample, MacroSpecParameter, MagicSuiteVersionInfo, MerlinChatRequest, Metric, NamedItem, Notification, NotificationAttachment, NotificationRecipient, Person, Project, ProjectIssue, ProjectIssueComment, ProjectTimeEntry, QuartzEntry, ReportBatchJob, ReportJob, ReportJobConnectionSummary, ReportMacroResult, ReportMacroResultAggregation, ReportMacroTypeInfo, ReportSchedule, Role, RoleMembership, RolePermission, Setting, Subscription, SubscriptionUsage, Sync, SyncConnectedSystem, SyncConnectedSystemDataSet, SyncConnectedSystemDataSetConstant, SyncConnectedSystemDataSetMapping, SyncStateDataSet, SyncVersion, Tenant, TenantBranding, Ticket, TicketFile, TicketGitCommit, TicketNote, TicketProject, TicketProjectComponent, TicketProjectComponentAssociation, TicketProjectEnvironment, TicketProjectNotificationRule, TicketProjectTicketAssignmentRule, TicketProjectTicketCategory, TicketProjectTicketSubCategory, TicketRelationship, TicketSprint, TicketWorkflow, TicketWorkflowCustomTicketField, TicketWorkflowRelationshipType, TicketWorkflowResolution, TicketWorkflowState, TicketWorkflowStateTransition, TicketWorkflowStateTransitionScreen, TicketWorkflowStateTransitionScreenField, TicketWorkflowSymbol, TicketWorkflowType, UserNotification, VariableDefault, Widget, WidgetItem, WidgetNode, Worker

EXAMPLES:
  magicsuite api get tenants
  magicsuite api get connections --filter Logic
  magicsuite api get reportschedules --select Id,Name,Enabled
  magicsuite api get-by-id tenant 1
  magicsuite api create connection --set Name="New Connection" --set Type=Kubernetes
  magicsuite api patch tenant 1 --set Name="New Name"
  magicsuite api delete tenant 1

For detailed help: magicsuite api <command> --help

commands.name: get
commands.description:
Get entities from the Magic Suite API.

DISCOVERED ENTITY TYPES:
  AgeingEvent, AntiForgeryToken, ApiInfo, ApiToken, AuditLog, Badge, BillableActivity, BloggerPost, CachedValue, Certification, CertificationAnswerOption, CertificationQuestion, CertificationSession, CertificationSessionAnswer, CertificationTopic, Connection, ConnectionRole, Dashboard, DashboardTab, DashboardTabTile, DataMagicSync, DataMagicSyncExecution, DocMagicStatusInfo, EventManager, EventManagerAction, EventManagerAlertManagementSystem, EventManagerCalculation, EventManagerConstant, EventManagerDeduplicationFieldTransformation, EventManagerDeduplicationMapping, EventManagerIncidentCommentSpec, EventManagerIncidentManagementSystem, EventManagerIncidentMapping, EventManagerIncidentSpec, EventManagerInstance, EventManagerPayload, EventManagerProblemCommentSpec, EventManagerProblemMapping, EventManagerProblemSpec, EventManagerProblemSpecAction, EventManagerSnippet, EventManagerTest, EventManagerTestOverride, EventManagerTestPayload, EventManagerVersion, FeedbackItem, FileDownloadKey, IdentifiedItem, Job, JobClaim, JsonBlob, MacroParameterDefault, MacroSpec, MacroSpecExample, MacroSpecParameter, MagicSuiteVersionInfo, MerlinChatRequest, Metric, NamedItem, Notification, NotificationAttachment, NotificationRecipient, Person, Project, ProjectIssue, ProjectIssueComment, ProjectTimeEntry, QuartzEntry, ReportBatchJob, ReportJob, ReportJobConnectionSummary, ReportMacroResult, ReportMacroResultAggregation, ReportMacroTypeInfo, ReportSchedule, Role, RoleMembership, RolePermission, Setting, Subscription, SubscriptionUsage, Sync, SyncConnectedSystem, SyncConnectedSystemDataSet, SyncConnectedSystemDataSetConstant, SyncConnectedSystemDataSetMapping, SyncStateDataSet, SyncVersion, Tenant, TenantBranding, Ticket, TicketFile, TicketGitCommit, TicketNote, TicketProject, TicketProjectComponent, TicketProjectComponentAssociation, TicketProjectEnvironment, TicketProjectNotificationRule, TicketProjectTicketAssignmentRule, TicketProjectTicketCategory, TicketProjectTicketSubCategory, TicketRelationship, TicketSprint, TicketWorkflow, TicketWorkflowCustomTicketField, TicketWorkflowRelationshipType, TicketWorkflowResolution, TicketWorkflowState, TicketWorkflowStateTransition, TicketWorkflowStateTransitionScreen, TicketWorkflowStateTransitionScreenField, TicketWorkflowSymbol, TicketWorkflowType, UserNotification, VariableDefault, Widget, WidgetItem, WidgetNode, Worker

FIELD SELECTION:
  --select Id,Name,Status Select specific fields
  --select *  Select all fields

ORDERING:
  --orderby Id            Order by Id ascending (default)
  --orderby "Name asc"    Order by Name ascending
  --orderby "-Id"         Order by Id descending (prefix -)
  --orderby "+Name,-Id"   Order by Name asc, then Id desc

SUPER ADMIN:
  --all-tenants           Include entities from all tenants (requires super admin)

EXAMPLES:
  magicsuite api get tenants --select Id,Name,Code
  magicsuite api get connections --filter Logic --select Name,Type
  magicsuite api get tenants --all-tenants --select Id,Name,Code
  magicsuite api get reportschedules --take 10 --orderby "-CreatedDateTime" --format json

options.name: --take
options.description: Maximum number of results to return [default: 100]

options.name: --top
options.description: Maximum number of results to return (deprecated, use --take)

options.name: --select
options.description: Fields to select (comma-separated, or * for all)

options.name: --all-tenants
options.description: Include entities from all tenants (requires super admin credentials) [default: False]

options.name: --output
options.description: Write output to file instead of console

options.name: --include-secrets
options.description: Include cleartext passwords for Connection entities (requires super admin) [default: False]

arguments.name: id
arguments.description: The ID of the entity to delete

commands.name: tenant
commands.description: Tenant selection and management

commands.name: select
commands.description: Switch to a different tenant

commands.name: current
commands.description: Show the currently active tenant

commands.name: list
commands.description: List all available tenants (requires Super Admin)

commands.name: file
commands.description:
Manage files and folders in Magic Suite file system.

OPERATIONS:
  list         - List files and folders
  upload       - Upload a local file to Magic Suite
  download     - Download a file from Magic Suite
  delete       - Delete a file or folder
  create-folder - Create a new folder
  rename - Rename/move a file or folder
  copy         - Copy a file or folder
  search - Search for files

EXAMPLES:
  magicsuite file list /Library
  magicsuite file upload report.pdf /Reports/monthly.pdf
  magicsuite file download /Reports/monthly.pdf ./local.pdf
  magicsuite file search 'budget'

commands.name: list
commands.description:
List files and folders in a Magic Suite path.

EXAMPLES:
  magicsuite file list
magicsuite file list /Library
  magicsuite file list /MyFiles --format json
  magicsuite file list /Library --ascii

options.name: --ascii
options.description: Use ASCII-only output (no Unicode symbols) [default: False]

commands.name: upload
commands.description:
Upload a local file to Magic Suite.

EXAMPLES:
  magicsuite file upload report.pdf /Reports/monthly.pdf
  magicsuite file upload data.csv /Library/imports/data.csv --force

arguments.name: remote-path
arguments.description: Remote file path in Magic Suite

commands.name: download
commands.description:
Download a file from Magic Suite to local filesystem.

EXAMPLES:
  magicsuite file download /Reports/monthly.pdf report.pdf
  magicsuite file download /Library/data.csv ./downloads/data.csv

arguments.name: remote-path
arguments.description: Remote file path in Magic Suite

arguments.name: local-path
arguments.description: Local file path to save to

commands.name: delete
commands.description:
Delete a file or folder from Magic Suite.

SAFETY:
  - Requires confirmation before deletion
  - Use --confirm flag to skip confirmation

EXAMPLES:
  magicsuite file delete /Temp/old.pdf
  magicsuite file delete /OldFolder --confirm

commands.name: create-folder
commands.description:
Create a new folder in Magic Suite.

EXAMPLES:
  magicsuite file create-folder /Reports/2024
magicsuite file create-folder /Library/NewProject

commands.name: rename
commands.description:
Rename or move a file or folder within Magic Suite.

EXAMPLES:
  magicsuite file rename /old.pdf /new.pdf
  magicsuite file rename /Temp/file.pdf /Archive/file.pdf

commands.name: copy
commands.description:
Copy a file or folder within Magic Suite.

EXAMPLES:
  magicsuite file copy /source.pdf /backup.pdf
  magicsuite file copy /Reports /Archive/Reports

commands.name: search
commands.description:
Search for files and folders in Magic Suite.

EXAMPLES:
  magicsuite file search 'report'
  magicsuite file search 'budget' --path /Reports
  magicsuite file search '*.pdf' --format json
  magicsuite file search 'report' --ascii

options.name: --ascii
options.description: Use ASCII-only output (no Unicode symbols) [default: False]

commands.name: watch
commands.description:
Monitor real-time events from Magic Suite.

EXAMPLES:
  magicsuite watch
  magicsuite watch --subject ReportJob
  magicsuite watch --subject ReportJob --type Create
  magicsuite watch --format json

options.name: --subject
options.description: Filter by notification subject (e.g., ReportJob, Connection, File)

options.name: --type
options.description: Filter by notification type (e.g., Create, Update, Delete)

commands.name: feedback
commands.description:
Submit feedback, bug reports, or feature requests to Magic Suite.

RATING TYPES:
  1 = Happy (Compliments)
  3 = Bug Report
  4 = Feature Request
  5 = Support Request

PRIORITY LEVELS:
  0 = Major (default)
  1 = Trivial
  2 = Minor
  3 = Critical
  4 = Blocker

EXAMPLES:
  magicsuite feedback --summary "Great feature!" --description "The new dashboard is excellent"
  magicsuite feedback --summary "Bug in reports" --description "Details..." --rating 3 --priority 3
  magicsuite feedback --summary "Feature request" --description "Please add..." --rating 4 --page /Reports
